hero_description: We integrate your systems, structure your metrics, and leave reliable pipelines ready for reporting, automation, and AI activation.
problem_title: When your data is scattered, decisions arrive late.
problem_description: Sales in one platform, finance in spreadsheets, operations in the ERP, and customers in the CRM. Urbs Data connects those sources into one source of truth: consistent, current, and ready to analyze, automate, and predict.
problem_card_data_description: Spreadsheets, ERP, CRM, and e-commerce do not share context; each team sees a different version of the business.
problem_card_manual_description: Hand-copied reports, slow reconciliations, and hours lost fixing data instead of using it.
problem_card_blind_description: Without traceability or one source of truth, teams debate numbers instead of acting on them.
company_cahpsa_detail: Designs, manufactures, and markets Paraguayan food and cleaning brands.
company_cigra_detail: Integrated producer solutions: inputs, commodities, production, and field management.
company_byontek_detail: Scientific platform for measuring, verifying, and certifying agricultural sustainability.
company_credito_argentino_detail: Personal loans, payments, promotions, and services for registered merchants.
company_fourplus_detail: Group offering engineering, agtech, telecommunications, and certification solutions.
company_macroagro_detail: Brokerage, barter, crop insurance, and grain services.
company_lbo_detail: Connects businesses with investments, grain markets, and financial solutions.
company_nexo_detail: Hotel distribution marketplace with global inventory and consolidated payments.
company_corteva_detail: Agricultural science, seeds, and crop protection.
company_hemisphere_detail: Builds home and garden brands with international manufacturers and US retailers.
services_title: Four services with one goal: turning your data into decisions.
services_description: We centralize your data sources, connect your systems, and build applications ready for reporting, automation, and AI at scale.
service_data_desc: One source of truth so every team sees the same business.
service_data_item_1: Cloud data platform design and implementation
service_data_item_5: Dashboards, KPIs, and alerts in BigQuery and Metabase
service_ai_desc: Models that anticipate, classify, and speed up decisions.
service_ai_item_2: LLM integrations with ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini
service_automation_desc: Processes that run on their own and systems that work together.
service_bi_desc: Web and mobile apps to operate better with your data.
service_bi_item_2: Portals for customers, teams, and partners
service_bi_item_3: Operational tools connected to your systems
service_bi_item_4: Back offices, forms, and custom workflows
flow_title: Your data journey, end to end
flow_description: Each data point moves through a reliable pipeline that turns it into decision-ready information.
flow_sources_desc: Excel, ERPs, e-commerce, APIs, and operational databases.
flow_ingest_info_desc: It is the process that extracts data from your systems, cleans it, and automatically loads it where it can power reporting, automation, or AI.
flow_warehouse_desc: Centralized, secure data ready to use in BigQuery.
flow_warehouse_info_desc: It is Google Cloud's analytics database: it lets you query large volumes of data quickly and securely without maintaining your own servers.
flow_modeling_desc: Versioned and tested models for each team.
flow_modeling_info_desc: dbt lets teams version, document, and test data models. This gives each business area information prepared for its metrics and processes.
flow_ai_bi_desc: Models, agents, and dashboards in Metabase.
flow_ai_bi_info_desc: It is a Business Intelligence tool for creating dashboards and queries without relying on manual reports.
flow_input_other_info_desc: APIs, operational databases, CRMs, CSV files, forms, or any system that stores useful business data.
flow_decisions_info_desc: The data is ready to act on: trusted KPIs, alerts, executive reports, and automations connected to real processes.
pymes_title: Enterprise-grade technology, within reach for your SMB
pymes_description: You do not need an internal data team. We organize your information and deliver ready-to-use dashboards and automations, with guidance at every step.
pymes_benefit_1: Centralized Excel, ERP, and e-commerce data
contact_description: A 30-minute call to review your sources, identify opportunities, and propose a concrete plan. No commitment and no unnecessary technical jargon.
contact_benefit_1: Assessment of your current data sources
contact_benefit_3: A concrete implementation plan with no commitment
contact_step_1_desc: We review your context and your data sources.
contact_step_2_desc: We send you a tailored proposal.
contact_step_3_desc: We put everything into production with hands-on support.
contact_response_note: Response in under 24 h · No commitment
contact_email_body:
Hi Urbs Data,

I would like to schedule a demo to talk about organizing and automating my company's data.

Name:
Company:
Website:
What I need to improve:

Thanks.
footer_description: Data engineering, AI, and software development to turn data into decisions.
seo_home_title: Urbs Data | Data engineering, AI and software development
seo_home_description: Data engineering, AI, and software development for centralizing data, structuring metrics, and enabling reliable decisions.
seo_home_keywords: data engineering, data platform, artificial intelligence, AI, software development, automation, business intelligence, dashboards, BigQuery, Metabase, dbt, ETL, SMB data solutions
seo_og_image_title: We turn your data into decisions and automated processes
seo_json_ld_service_name: Data engineering, AI and software development
not_found_description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has moved.
otp_denied: The code does not match. Check it and try again.
otp_unavailable: Internal access is not configured in this environment.
otp_idle: Enter the internal code to continue.
signatures_gate_description: Internal tool for creating HTML signatures that stay consistent with the brand's visual system.
signatures_description: Fill in the employee details, review the preview, and copy or download the HTML to paste into the email client.
presentations_gate_description: Internal library for downloading editable PPT bases that follow the Urbs Data brand guidelines.
presentations_title: Download PPT templates ready to adapt.
presentations_description: Each file includes structure, typographic hierarchy, palette, logo, and data patterns based on the brand guidelines. When you add a slide, you can choose a base with the branding already in place.
presentations_fonts_note_outro: To render them correctly in PowerPoint, install those fonts on your machine from Fontsource before opening or editing the PPT.
presentation_template_executive_descript: Summary, indicators, risks, and an action-oriented close.
presentation_template_data_review_descri: Scorecard, trend, segments, and insight. Uses the brand's data scale.
presentation_template_pitch_description: Problem, how it works, impact, and demo close. A sales narrative.
presentation_template_case_study_descrip: Challenge, approach, architecture, and measurable before-and-after results.
ppt_executive_cover_body: Cover for committees, progress reports, and leadership decisions. Replace the text while keeping the hierarchy.
ppt_executive_situation_title: What changed and why it matters
ppt_executive_situation_body: Open with context, impact, and the decision that needs to be unblocked. Less information, higher signal.
ppt_executive_situation_bullet_1: Context — the period's starting point in one line.
ppt_executive_situation_bullet_2: Impact — what moved and its effect on the business.
ppt_executive_situation_bullet_3: Decision — what you need to resolve in this meeting.
ppt_executive_note_body: One idea per slide. If you need more, split it into two.
ppt_executive_metrics_body: A few well-chosen numbers with a clear read on the movement.
ppt_executive_risks_body: Prioritize what needs executive attention; the rest belongs in the appendix.
ppt_executive_close_body: Close with owner, date, and success criteria. Leave the action unambiguous.
ppt_data_review_cover_body: Base for weekly reviews, monthly reviews, or narrated dashboards. Uses the brand's data scale.
ppt_data_review_scorecard_body: Compact cards that make trend and gap visible at a glance.
ppt_data_review_trend_body: Identify slope changes, anomalies, and comparable periods. The latest period is highlighted with the accent color.
ppt_data_review_segments_body: Separate volume, conversion, and quality so conclusions do not get mixed.
ppt_data_review_close_body: Connect the data readout to a concrete action and owner.
ppt_pitch_cover_title:
From scattered data to
operable decisions
ppt_pitch_cover_body: Narrative for explaining the problem, the solution, and the proposed transformation.
ppt_pitch_problem_body: Show friction, opportunity cost, and urgency with concrete examples.
ppt_pitch_problem_bullet_1: Data in ERP, CRM, e-commerce, and spreadsheets with no connection.
ppt_pitch_problem_bullet_2: Manual reports that arrive late and already outdated.
ppt_pitch_problem_bullet_3: Decisions based on intuition, not evidence.
ppt_pitch_note_body: Every manual report costs hours and hides errors that are hard to audit.
ppt_pitch_steps_body: Organize the flow from sources to decisions.
ppt_step_integrate_desc: We connect ERP, CRM, and spreadsheets into one source of truth.
ppt_step_model_desc: We transform and validate with dbt on BigQuery.
ppt_step_deliver_desc: Dashboards and automations connected to execution.
ppt_pitch_impact_body: Time, quality, and adoption metrics after implementation.
ppt_pitch_close_title:
Next step: validate
with a real case
ppt_pitch_close_body: Close with scope, owners, and a date for a concrete pilot.
ppt_case_cover_body: Document challenge, solution, and results as a reusable reference.
ppt_case_challenge_body: Explain the starting point without overstating complexity.
ppt_case_challenge_bullet_1: Multiple sources without a shared data model.
ppt_case_challenge_bullet_2: A small team with little time for reporting.
ppt_case_note_body: 8 weeks, one source of truth, and three key dashboards.
ppt_case_approach_body: Show why this path was chosen.
ppt_case_source_desc: Incremental ingestion from ERP, CRM, and spreadsheets.
ppt_case_warehouse_desc: Modeling in BigQuery with clean, versioned layers.
ppt_case_consumption_desc: Dashboards and alerts connected to daily operations.
ppt_case_results_body: Compare the initial state against the achieved improvement.
ppt_case_close_title:
What scales and what
is worth repeating
ppt_case_close_body: Turn the case into a reusable reference for the next project.
